rulings.Case Title: DONALD S MITCHELL VS. ROGER S PAUL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 15, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT ROGER PAUL, MISHIARA BAKER, ELODIE PAUL, DAHLIA PAUL DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT The Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay recused himself. The parties will be notified of the new hearing date, time and location by August 19, 2016. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STRUCTURE PROPERTIES, INC. VS. THANH HUYNH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 15, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT THANH HUYNH DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Verification is sufficient. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNA HONG VS. VINCENT G REYES
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 15, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT VINCENT REYES MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LI GAO VS. NABIL SALEH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 15, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT NABIL SALEH DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Notice is sufficient under SFRO 37.9(a)(8)(iii). = (501/REQ)
